name: Agape ATP Corp
summary: PART I 1. ORGANIZATION AND BUSINESS BACKGROUND Agape ATP Corporation, a Nevada corporation (the Company) was incorporated under the laws of the State of Nevada on June 1, 2016. Agape ATP Corporation operates through its subsidiaries, namely, Agape ATP Corporation (AATP LB), a company incorporated in Labuan, Malaysia, and Agape Superior Living Sdn. Bhd. (ASL), a company incorporated in Malaysia. AATP LB, incorporated in Labuan, Malaysia, is an investment holding company with 100% equity interest ...
